analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for creating an interactive and visually appealing experience. The CSS file is incomplete and needs to be fully developed to include animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file requires additional sections and interactive elements related to black holes. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and needs to be completed to ensure all functions are properly implemented.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS is mobile-responsive and includes interactive elements for a better user experience.

Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Include sections for interactive planets, animated slides, and other content related to black holes.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in the HTML file.
